name: EPA+DHA supplementation reduces PMN activation in microenvironment of chronic venous leg ulcers
short_name: EPA+DHA chronic venous leg ulcer PMN study
summary: A 2017 randomized double-blind controlled Wound Repair and Regeneration study testing oral EPA+DHA as an adjunct to standard chronic venous leg ulcer care and measuring PMN activation, wound-fluid proteases, and wound-area change.
